title: NodeIdentity v1
description: Machine-readable schema for the persisted local identity of a network-participating Orbiplex Node.

node/id.description: Stable Node identifier derived from the public key and persisted across restarts until explicit rotation. In v1 this MUST be `node:did:key:z<base58btc(0xed01 || raw_ed25519_public_key)>`.

created-at.description: Timestamp when the local identity was first created.

identity/status.description: Local lifecycle state of the identity material.

key/alg.description: Public-key algorithm used to derive `node/id` and sign networking artifacts.

key/public.description: Canonical did:key fingerprint payload used by peers to validate signed advertisements and handshakes. In v1 this is the base58btc multibase Ed25519 public-key fingerprint without the `node:did:key:` prefix.

key/storage-ref.description: Local secure-storage or keystore reference to the corresponding private key material. This is the preferred target shape once key resolution is split from the identity record.

private_key_base64.description: Inline base64url-encoded private key material. This is allowed as a bootstrap-compatible shape for early Node implementations, but should later give way to `key/storage-ref`.

federation/default-id.description: Optional default federation binding used by higher layers.

policy_annotations.description: Optional local annotations that do not change networking semantics.
